26.reason: [Accessing s.data[s.top] is out of bounds; the top element is at index s.top - 1, not s.top. This causes undefined behavior and incorrect output.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing s.data[s.top] is out of bounds; the top element is at index s.top - 1, not s.top. This causes undefined behavior and incorrect output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect index: should be s.data[s.top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, so the top element is at index s.top-1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: should access s.data[s.top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: should access s.data[s.top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: should access s.data[s.top - 1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element]

38.reason: [Incrementing top before storing the value leads to storing at index s.top (which is now 1-based), causing off-by-one error. Should store first, then increment. Also, this makes the next pop access s.data[s.top] which is one past the actual top.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incrementing top before storing the value leads to storing at index s.top (which is now 1-based), causing off-by-one error. Should store first, then increment. Also, this makes the next pop access s.data[s.top] which is one past the actual top.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incrementing before storing causes out-of-bounds write and skips index 0; should store first then increment, or use s.data[s.top] then s.top++]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect order: incrementing top before storing causes writing beyond current top; should store first then increment, or use s.data[s.top] then s.top++]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect order: incrementing top before storing causes writing beyond current top; should store first then increment, or use s.data[s.top] then s.top++]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect order: incrementing top before storing causes writing beyond current top and skips index 0; should store first then increment]

39.reason: [Writing to s.data[s.top] after increment leads to using index 1..100 instead of 0..99, and may exceed array bounds when top becomes 100]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Writing to s.data[s.top] after increment leads to using index 1..100 instead of 0..99, and may exceed array bounds when top becomes 100]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Due to prior increment, this writes to s.data[s.top] which is one position ahead of intended; also fails to output space after popped value in pop operation]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Due to prior increment, this writes to s.data[s.top] where s.top is already incremented, leading to off-by-one and potential out-of-bounds if top was 99]
